description_long: This is a compact, upholstered chaise with a gently curved backrest and armrests on both sides, finished in a light gray fabric. The backrest features subtle button tufting, adding a touch of classic elegance to its modern silhouette. The seat consists of two large, plush cushions that provide ample comfort for sitting or reclining. The chaise stands on four short, turned wooden legs with a natural wood finish, slightly elevating the piece above the ground. The upholstery appears smooth and matte, with no visible patterns except for the tufting on the backrest. This piece would be suitable for placement in urban parks, public waiting areas, or residential outdoor patios.
description: A light gray, button-tufted chaise with curved backrest, dual armrests, and two plush seat cushions, supported by short wooden legs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the chaise, highlighting the button-tufted backrest, dual seat cushions, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the gentle backward slope of the backrest and the thickness of the seat cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, unadorned back of the chaise and the wooden legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest and the profile of the seat and backrest.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is moderately high, gently curved, and features subtle button tufting for a classic look. It is continuous across the width of the chaise, providing support and a touch of decorative detail.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, integrated into the curved silhouette of the chaise, and rise smoothly from the seat to meet the backrest.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, turned, and made of wood with a natural finish, providing a traditional accent to the otherwise modern design.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and button tufting on the backrest. No other patterns or surface treatments are visible.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two large, rectangular seat cushions placed side by side, both appearing to be attached or closely fitted to the frame. No additional loose cushions are visible.
